root_cause_summary: Database connection pool exhaustion due to a suspected session leak
root_cause_detail: The application's database connection pool is being exhausted due to a suspected session leak. The connection pool size is 20 with a maximum overflow of 5, but the application is consistently checking out more connections than are available, leading to timeouts and errors. This is likely due to the application not properly closing database sessions after use, causing the connections to remain checked out and unavailable for other requests.

key_evidence.snippet: 2026-03-17 11:40:48,062 WARN  [sqlalchemy.pool.impl.QueuePool] Connection pool usage high checked_out=18 overflow=2 pool_size=20 max_overflow=5
key_evidence.significance: Early warning of connection pool usage being high

key_evidence.snippet: 2026-03-17 11:41:02,902 ERROR [sqlalchemy.pool.impl.QueuePool] QueuePool limit of size 20 overflow 5 reached, connection timed out, timeout 30.00
2026-03-17 11:41:17,071 WARN  [api.db] suspected session leak count=23 release_rate_below_threshold=true

uncertainty_notes: Further investigation is needed to confirm the suspected session leak and to identify the root cause of the leak.

specific_error_codes: QueuePool limit of size 20 overflow 5 reached
